Workshop

Posted: Jan 31, 2024

This year’s DSA event will be in-person, starting on the 6th and 7th June hosted by the Dedan Kimathi University of Technology in Nyeri. We believe that the DSA community of both past and new participants can still benefit greatly from the event.

The DSA Nyeri event will consist of oral presentations of data science applications from academia and industry and interactive panel discussions.

Additional info will be added here

Any questions? Email organizers at info@datascienceafrica.org
